Could you please clarify whether the recent updates to the privacy policy affect my account settings, considering that I've been using the service consistently since 2018? I'm particularly interested in understanding if any of my personal information has been shared in ways not disclosed before.

I'm so frustrated right now! My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it, and it’s really impacting my work. I don’t even know why this is happening, but I was thinking maybe it’s the new phone I got last week? I hope you can help me fix this soon!

I was really disappointed because I ordered a pair of shoes in a size 9, but what I received was a size 8. I know I can't return it for a full refund according to your policy, but it just feels unfair. I genuinely just want my money back and not a store credit. Can you help me with that?

Hello, I'm encountering an issue where the search results page loads correctly, but the filters I try to apply do not seem to work at all. I've tried using different browsers and cleared my cache, but the problem persists. Could you please help me resolve this issue?
My app isn't working, but it was fine earlier. Can it be broken or is it just me?

Dear Support Team, I am writing to formally request a refund for my recent purchase. I ordered a pair of shoes on your website, and while the design was appealing, I was disappointed to find that the color was not as described in the product images. Additionally, the packaging was quite excessive, which seems unnecessary. I believe my situation warrants consideration for a refund, despite the other details I mentioned. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

I was trying to connect to your service through the app, but it said I couldn't log in. I reset my password multiple times, and each time the app claimed my new password was incorrect, yet I know for a fact that I was entering it correctly. The whole situation is quite frustrating. Can you help me resolve this issue?
